series_metadata.series_description: Records contain quarterly employer wage details, e.g. social security number, name, wage and weeks worked. Which are used to determine eligibilit for unemployment compensation and cross-matching against other state and federal agency wage activity.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office seven ; Microform: in office 5 years following quarter microfilmed. Send microfilm Records Center an additional 2 years ; Paper: in office and microfilmed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
